sentences.translation: Muhamed je zakazao termin kod ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: Mohammed booked an appointment with the doctor.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى العِيَادَةِ فِي الوَقْتِ المُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u ambulantu u zakazano vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the clinic at the scheduled time.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَ الطَّبِيبَ عَنْ أَلَمِهِ فِي الرَّأْسِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je ljekaru o bolovima u glavi.
sentences.translationEn: He told the doctor about his headache.

sentences.translation: Ljekar ga je pregledao i napisao mu lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor examined him and wrote him a prescription.
